name: vision-product-loop
description: A Codex plugin for turning a product vision into an iterative build loop.

interface.shortDescription: Align on a product vision, then iterate until the build matches it.
interface.longDescription: Vision Product Loop helps Codex establish a durable product vision, grill unclear intent, discover project-local architecture and harnesses, and run implementation cycles that compare real progress against the agreed goal.
defaultPrompt: Turn this vision into an implementation loop.
Grill me until this product vision is crisp.
Compare the current product to the vision.
